steps.t: The missing parts of the main cistern valve can be found within the cisterns. You should find and collect these parts for Rathon.
Rathon can be found outside the cistern entrance on the Fourth Circle of Minas Tirith. You should speak with Rathon.
The main drainage valve can be found outside the cisterns on the Fourth Circle of Minas Tirith. You should repair the main drainage valve for Rathon.
Rathon can be found outside the cistern entrance on the Fourth Circle of Minas Tirith. You should speak with Rathon.
